view.title: Validate explicit UC need #12
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 12 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the custom CRM integration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific event type 'customer.created' leading to a POST to the company CRM, which should result in the sales team seeing a new lead in Salesforce. However, while there is a mention of 'customer.created' in the linked use case, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this integration is functioning as required. The lack of evidence for the actual API call or the resulting state in the CRM leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
